heading: Federal pilots authorized
label: 8503 Federal pilots authorized
notes: Amendments2020—Subsec. (c). substituted “Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation” for “Saint Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation”.Pub. L. 116–2601998—Subsec. (a)(2). added par. (2) and struck out former par. (2) which read as follows: “operating on the navigable waters of the United States.”Pub. L. 105–3831990—Subsec. children.label: A
children.text: in internal waters of the United States; or

children.label: B
children.text: within 3 nautical miles from the baselines from which the territorial sea of the United States is measured.
establishes a requirement for a State licensed pilot; and
notifies the Secretary of that fact.

children.label: c
children.text: For the Saint Lawrence Seaway, the Secretary may not delegate the authority under this section to an agency except the Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation.

children.label: d
children.text: A person violating this section or a regulation prescribed under this section is liable to the United States Government for a civil penalty of not more than $25,000. Each day of a continuing violation is a separate violation. The vessel also is liable in rem for the penalty.

children.label: e
children.text: A person that knowingly violates this section or a regulation prescribed under this section commits a class D felony.
